title: Antioxidants and Cancer Risk
text: Dietary antioxidants may reduce oxidative stress linked to cancer risk.
Vitamin D deficiency is associated with bone density loss.

title: Omega-3 Fatty Acids
text: Omega-3 fatty acids from fish oil support cardiovascular health.
Fiber intake improves gut microbiome diversity.

title: Sodium Intake
text: Reducing sodium intake is linked to lower blood pressure.
